mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rides (rider_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status_type_id, estimated_fare, surge_multiplier, hash) VALUES ( #{riderId}::uuid, #{pickupLat}, #{pickupLng}, #{dropoffLat}, #{dropoffLng}, #{statusTypeId}, #{estimatedFare}, #{surgeMultiplier}, #{hash} ) ON CONFLICT (hash) WHERE delete_info IS NULL DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT id, rider_id, driver_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status_type_id, estimated_fare, final_fare, surge_multiplier, search_radius_km, started_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rides WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL

SELECT id, rider_id, driver_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status_type_id, estimated_fare, final_fare, surge_multiplier, search_radius_km, started_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rides WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE rides SET status_type_id = #{statusTypeId}, cancelled_at = #{cancelledAt}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL
UPDATE rides SET driver_id = #{driverId}::uuidNULL, status_type_id = #{statusTypeId}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL AND status_type_id = 7
UPDATE rides SET final_fare = #{finalFare}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL

UPDATE rides SET status_type_id = #{statusTypeId}, started_at = #{startedAt}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, final_fare = #{finalFare}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id, rider_id, driver_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status_type_id, estimated_fare, final_fare, surge_multiplier, search_radius_km, started_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rides WHERE rider_id = #{riderId}::uuid AND status_type_id IN (7, 9, 10) AND delete_info IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, rider_id, driver_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status_type_id, estimated_fare, final_fare, surge_multiplier, search_radius_km, started_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at FROM rides WHERE driver_id = #{driverId}::uuid AND status_type_id IN (9, 10) AND delete_info IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM rides r WHERE r.rider_id = #{riderId}::uuid AND r.status_type_id = 11 AND r.delete_info IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payments p WHERE p.ride_id = r.id AND p.delete_info IS NULL ) )

SELECT r.id, r.rider_id, r.driver_id, r.pickup_lat, r.pickup_lng, r.dropoff_lat, r.dropoff_lng, r.status_type_id, r.estimated_fare, r.final_fare, r.surge_multiplier, r.started_at, r.completed_at, r.cancelled_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.search_radius_km FROM rides r WHERE r.rider_id = #{riderId}::uuid AND r.status_type_id = 11 AND r.delete_info IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payments p WHERE p.ride_id = r.id AND p.delete_info IS NULL ) ORDER BY r.completed_at DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id, r.rider_id, r.driver_id, r.pickup_lat, r.pickup_lng, r.dropoff_lat, r.dropoff_lng, r.status_type_id, r.estimated_fare, r.final_fare, r.surge_multiplier, r.started_at, r.completed_at, r.cancelled_at, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.search_radius_km FROM rides r WHERE r.status_type_id = 7 AND r.delete_info IS NULL AND (6371 * acos( cos(radians(#{lat})) * cos(radians(r.pickup_lat)) * cos(radians(r.pickup_lng) - radians(#{lng})) + sin(radians(#{lat})) * sin(radians(r.pickup_lat)) )) <= r.search_radius_km AND r.id NOT IN ( SELECT rd.ride_id FROM ride_declines rd WHERE rd.driver_id = #{driverId}::uuid AND rd.delete_info IS NULL ) ORDER BY r.created_at ASC

SELECT id, rider_id, driver_id, pickup_lat, pickup_lng, dropoff_lat, dropoff_lng, status_type_id, estimated_fare, final_fare, surge_multiplier, started_at, completed_at, cancelled_at, created_at, updated_at, search_radius_km FROM rides WHERE status_type_id = 7 AND delete_info IS NULL AND search_radius_km < #{maxRadiusKm} AND created_at < now() - (#{staleSeconds} || ' seconds')::interval AND updated_at < now() - (#{staleSeconds} || ' seconds')::interval
mapper.update: UPDATE rides SET search_radius_km = #{searchRadiusKm}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{id}::uuid AND delete_info IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rides WHERE status_type_id = 7 AND delete_info IS NULL AND pickup_lat BETWEEN #{lat} - (#{radiusKm} / 111.0) AND #{lat} + (#{radiusKm} / 111.0) AND pickup_lng BETWEEN #{lng} - (#{radiusKm} / (111.0 * cos(radians(#{lat})))) AND #{lng} + (#{radiusKm} / (111.0 * cos(radians(#{lat}))))
